name: get_celestial_bodies
description: Get all celestial bodies in the Stargazer collection, including their coordinates and type

name: get_todays_apod
description: Get today's NASA Astronomy Picture of the Day, including the title, explanation, and image URL

name: get_visible_tonight
description: Calculate which celestial bodies are visible tonight from a given location. Accepts a street address (preferred) or latitude/longitude coordinates.

address.description: Street address, city, or place name (e.g. '173 Hart Street Brooklyn NY')

latitude.description: Observer's latitude in decimal degrees (fallback if no address)

longitude.description: Observer's longitude in decimal degrees (fallback if no address)

name: lookup_simbad
description: Look up a celestial body in the SIMBAD astronomical reference database. Returns the canonical scientific name, authoritative coordinates, object type, and checks if the body is in the local Stargazer database. Use this when the user asks for details about a specific celestial object or wants to verify astronomical data.

name.description: Name of the celestial body to look up (e.g. 'Crab Nebula', 'Betelgeuse', 'M31')
